widget.name: Viewer Pdf
widget.description: Feature-rich PDF viewer. Pass a base64 string, data URL, or HTTP URL via the PDF String property.

property.caption: PDF String
property.description: Pass the PDF content as a base64 string (raw base64 or data:application/pdf;base64,... format), or a standard HTTP/HTTPS URL.

property.caption: Download File Name Test
property.description: Name for the downloaded file (without .pdf extension). Defaults to "document".

property.caption: Dark Mode
property.description: Enable dark theme for the viewer

property.caption: Show Thumbnail Sidebar
property.description: Show the thumbnail panel on the left side for page navigation. Default: off.

property.caption: Enable Search
property.description: Show the search button in the toolbar to allow full-text search within the PDF document

property.caption: Enable Download
property.description: Show a download button in the toolbar

property.caption: Enable Print
property.description: Show a print button in the toolbar

property.caption: Enable Import (Upload)
property.description: Show an import/upload button so users can load a PDF from their local device (also enables drag-and-drop)

property.caption: Enable Copy All Text
property.description: Show a copy-text button that copies all document text to the clipboard

property.caption: Enable Rotate
property.description: Show a rotate button in the toolbar to rotate the PDF pages 90° at a time

property.caption: Enable Fit to Page
property.description: Show a fit-to-page button in the toolbar (scales the PDF to fit both width and height). Fit to Width is always available.
